scripts.mobile:ios: next build && cap sync && cap run ios
scripts.mobile:android: next build && cap sync && cap run android
scripts.mobile:ios:studio: next build && cap sync && cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android:studio: next build && cap sync && cap open android
scripts.mobile:live:android: NODE_ENV=development DEV_HOST=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 2>/dev/null || ipconfig getifaddr en1 2>/dev/null || echo localhost) cap copy android && cap run android
scripts.mobile:live:ios: NODE_ENV=development DEV_HOST=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 2>/dev/null || ipconfig getifaddr en1 2>/dev/null || echo localhost) cap copy ios && cap run ios
